author: rajatsharma
name: SOTA Stack + Depth Recurrence
blurb: All proven SOTA techniques (XSA-all, BigramHash 3072x112, SmearGate, LeakyReLU^2, 11L 3xMLP, partial RoPE, LN scale, EMA, Late QAT, int6 GPTQ-lite + LZMA-9, sliding eval stride=64, Muon WD 0.04) ported into the clean baseline, plus optional depth recurrence for increased effective depth at zero param cost.
technique_summary: XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 + SmearGate + LeakyReLU^2 3xMLP + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + Late QAT + int6 GPTQ-lite + LZMA-9 + Sliding eval + Muon WD + Depth Recurrence
